summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SwarmSim Live Intelligence feature. All core functionality working correctly - mode toggle, live data fetching, knowledge graph generation, intel brief display, and Continue to Agents flow. Backend API tests show 10/11 passing (1 timeout on edge case). Document Upload mode regression test passed.

minor.issue: Empty topic string not validated upfront - causes timeout instead of immediate 400/422 error

passed_tests: Mode toggle between Document Upload and Live Intelligence works correctly
Live Intelligence form shows topic input, prediction horizon selector, optional custom question, and Fetch & Analyze button
Backend POST /api/sessions/{id}/fetch-live returns graph with entities and relationships plus intel_brief
Frontend correctly calls /fetch-live endpoint when user enters topic and clicks Fetch & Analyze
After fetching live data, knowledge graph view renders with intel brief details (key developments, data points)
Continue to Agents flow works after live intelligence fetch
Document Upload mode still works correctly (regression test passed)
Mode toggle switches UI content properly without breaking state
Session data_mode is set to 'live' after fetch-live call
Invalid session ID returns 404 on fetch-live
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding input validation for empty topic string in fetch-live endpoint to return immediate 400 error instead of attempting to process

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - 1 timeout on edge case)

seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Intelligence feature fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_live_intelligence.py cover fetch-live endpoint, prediction horizons, session data mode, and full live-to-agents flow. Frontend Playwright tests verified mode toggle, form inputs, fetch flow, graph rendering, and Continue to Agents navigation. Previous iteration_1.json covered Document Upload flow which had file upload issues - those were not retested in this iteration as focus was on new Live Intelligence feature.
